${ModID}:AfterburnerPower.NAME: Afterburner
DESCRIPTIONS: When a card enters your hand during your turn, apply #yNitro to #b%d random card%s in your draw pile.

${ModID}:DragsterPower.NAME: Dragster
DESCRIPTIONS: The first #b%d cards you play each turn gain #yNitro and are shuffled into your draw pile.
